creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 152520
build log for editors/cream editors/vim-7.44

In an attempt to build/install editors/cream,
editors/vim was sucked in as a dependency. The attempted
build failed (logs attached).
Failing to see an immediate solution, I tarred up the
editors/vim folder, and sucked down the most recent
version via svn(1). Then attempted the build with that
version. Which also failed at seemingly the same place.

Please find 2 complete build sessions attached, for
complete details.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
